basic_details.job_title: GMCH Tiruppur Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Ward Manager, Multipurpose Hospital Worker Posts
basic_details.short_information: Government Medical College Hospital Tiruppur (GMCH Tiruppur) Recruitment 2026: Government Medical College Hospital Tiruppur is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 7 Ward Manager, Multipurpose Hospital Worker posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Basic Degree, Diploma or Certificate course in Computer Application, Literacy (read and write), One year experience in hospital
qualification.details: Ward Manager: Basic Degree with Diploma or certificate course in Computer Application. One year prior experience in a hospital. Multipurpose Hospital Worker: Should know to read and write. One year prior experience in a hospital.

salary_details.details: Ward Manager: Rs. 12000/- Per Month Multipurpose Hospital Worker: Rs. 8500/- Per Month

selection_process: Document Verification Direct Interview Merit List based on marks as per G.O.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for GMCH Tiruppur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Ward Manager and Multipurpose Hospital Worker posts is scheduled for 19 May 2026. Candidates should report to the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Ward Manager post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies available for the Ward Manager position at Government Medical College Hospital Tiruppur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Multipurpose Hospital Worker post?
faq.answer: For the Multipurpose Hospital Worker post, candidates should know how to read and write and possess at least one year of prior experience in a hospital setting.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts advertised by Government Medical College Hospital Tiruppur is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for GMCH Tiruppur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Ward Manager position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Ward Manager position is Rs. 12000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these government jobs?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Document Verification, a Direct Interview, and the preparation of a Merit List based on marks as per Government Orders.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for GMCH Tiruppur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
